observations: runx --version returned runx-cli 0.6.14 for the registry publish/read/add/harness flow; patched PR source also builds and passes pnpm verify:fast for the resume input preservation fix.
Verified GitHub account RYDE-PLAY/ryde-play is the claimant identity and stars runxhq/runx.
Package name is exactly rollback-judge and registry ref is ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-c78cb2af1e56.

Registry public URL is https://runx.ai/x/ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-c78cb2af1e56; registry read resolved digest sha256:5ae63ce29dc69068a9ad8074006a672e8d90611a65b3fe88315c8052ef4842bc and profile digest sha256:dac53cdc3031b4d3c97251bd94e7b836229151e3d72008f1bb6b8a8e20fc8537.
Clean install with runx add ryde-play/rollback-judge@sha-c78cb2af1e56 --registry https://api.runx.ai succeeded.
Local harness passed 2 cases: critical-signal-rollback, signal-contradictory-block.
Hosted-installed harness passed 2 cases: critical-signal-rollback, signal-contradictory-block.
Harness case critical-signal-rollback seeds act_decision=approve and act_target_ref=runx:release:checkout@2026.07.12.2, then seals a rollback review decision.
Harness case signal-contradictory-block omits caller.answers and returns needs_agent, so no decision is sealed and no release approval is seeded.
Dogfood initial run returned needs_agent and its request envelope included act_decision=approve plus act_target_ref=runx:release:checkout@2026.07.12.2.
Dogfood output used deploy_signal severity=critical, kind=error_rate_spike, action=rollback, reason=error_rate_critical, version_target=2026.07.12.2.

Dogfood receipt runx:receipt:sha256:5e3bd02d3ad36ec4a51fbde4eeb58a3cc628b866cb5f09b3fc2fd2bdfed704ce records act_judge form=review with summary "action=rollback reason=error_rate_critical target=2026.07.12.2".
Dogfood receipt act target_refs includes runx:release:checkout@2026.07.12.2 and decision.inputs.target_ref is runx:release:checkout@2026.07.12.2.
The sealed receipt therefore records action=rollback, reason=error_rate_critical, and judged release target 2026.07.12.2 in receipt bytes, directly addressing the human revision note.
runx verify returned valid=true, signature.status=valid, signature.mode=production.
The verification public key is published; the private signing seed is not included in artifacts.
